name: DateHandler
desc: Handles conversion between DateTime and ISO 8601 String.

name: canHandle
desc:
Checks if this handler can specifically handle the given value.
This is optional and mainly used for runtime type checking if T is dynamic.

name: deserialize
desc: Converts a serialized value (e.g., String, Map) to type T.

name: serialize
desc: Converts a value of type T to a serializable format (e.g., String, Map).

name: DsStaticFileHandler
desc: Middleware/Handler for serving static files.

name: handle
desc:
Checks if the request URI path corresponds to a file in one of the allowed directories.
Returns a DsCustomMiddleWareResponse if the file is found, otherwise null.

name: TypeHandler
desc: Interface for handling custom types in requests and responses.

name: canHandle
desc:
Checks if this handler can specifically handle the given value.
This is optional and mainly used for runtime type checking if T is dynamic.

name: deserialize
desc: Converts a serialized value (e.g., String, Map) to type T.

name: serialize
desc: Converts a value of type T to a serializable format (e.g., String, Map).

name: TypeHandlerRegistry
desc: Registry to manage and access TypeHandlers.

name: deserialize
desc:
Deserializes a value to type T using a registered handler.
Throws an Exception if no handler is registered for T.

name: hasHandler
desc: Checks if a handler is registered for type T.

name: register
desc: Registers a handler for type T.

name: serialize
desc:
Serializes a value using a registered handler if available.
Returns the value as-is if no handler is found.

name: unregister
desc: Unregisters the handler for type T.

name: handle
desc: Handles the incoming request and processes it through the middleware chain.

desc: Handles the incoming request and processes it through the middleware chain.

name: createDownloadHandler
desc: Creates a Shelf handler that serves files from baseDir.

desc: A string representation of this object.
